gl-issue.description: GitLab issue: metadata, description, human comments, related MRs, images downloaded.

gl-mr.description: GitLab merge request: branch, pipeline, reviewer/approval, diff stat, linked issue, description, comments.

gl-pipeline.description: GitLab pipeline: job list with statuses grouped by stage.

gl-job.description: GitLab job log: MR context, error pattern search + tail.
